description_long: This guard rail consists of a long, horizontal top rail supported by a series of evenly spaced vertical posts, each anchored to a square base. The structure is made of a metallic material, likely galvanized steel, giving it a uniform gray color and a robust, industrial appearance. The top rail is flat and rectangular in profile, providing a continuous barrier along its length. The vertical posts are relatively slender but sturdy, with each post mounted on a broad, flat base for stability. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function as a safety barrier in urban environments.
description: A long, gray metallic guard rail with a flat top rail supported by multiple vertical posts on square bases, designed for robust urban safety.
description_view_0: The guard rail is seen from the end, showing the narrow profile of the top rail and a single vertical post with its square base.
description_view_1: The full length of the guard rail is visible, displaying all vertical posts and their square bases in a straight line.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end-on perspective highlights the thin edge of the top rail and one supporting post.
description_view_3: A mirrored view of view 1, showing the entire row of vertical posts and the continuous top rail from the opposite side.
